SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.fx.controls

Class TextPane

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.control.Control
com.dua3.utility.fx.controls.TextPane
All Implemented Interfaces:
RichTextPane, javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget, javafx.scene.control.Skinnable
Direct Known Subclasses:
TextEditorPane
public class TextPane extends javafx.scene.control.Control implements RichTextPane
A read-only JavaFX control for displaying RichText.

The control renders text using Graphics.renderText(Vector2f, RichText, HAnchor, VAnchor, Alignment, VerticalAlignment, Dimension2f, Graphics.TextWrapping) so line breaking and wrapping match the Utility text layout implementation.

Inline controls can be embedded by assigning styles containing RichTextBuilderExtBase.STYLE_ATTRIBUTE_INLINE_NODE_FACTORY to a run.

  • Field Details

    • FONT_UTIL

      protected static final FxFontUtil FONT_UTIL
      A shared instance of FxFontUtil used for font-related utilities within the TextPane class. This utility provides various font-related operations and methods to support text layout, rendering, and styling in JavaFX.

      This variable is declared as protected static final to ensure it is accessible within this class and its subclasses, but cannot be modified after initialization.
